## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## 🖥 Environment

- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125] (for frontend bugs)
- **Python version:** [e.g. 3.11.5] (for backend bugs)
- **Node version:** [e.g. 20.11.0] (for frontend bugs)

## 📷 Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, paste error logs or add screenshots.

```
paste logs here
```

## 📎 Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
